Handees

Customer Terms of Use

Last Updated: March 2026

1. Introduction

Welcome to Handees. By using our platform (via WhatsApp, web, or mobile app) to request and hire artisans, you agree to these Terms of Use. Please read them carefully.

2. Our Role: The Intermediary

Handees operates as a technology platform that connects you with independent, third-party artisans (e.g., plumbers, electricians, carpenters).

  • Independent Contractors: The artisans on our network are independent professionals, not employees, agents, or representatives of Handees.
  • The Contract: When you hire an artisan, the actual contract for the service is directly between you and the artisan. Handees is solely the facilitator of this connection.

3. Trust, Safety, and Vetting Limitations

Handees is committed to fostering a secure environment for our community. To achieve this, we deploy commercially reasonable efforts to vet professionals before granting them access to the platform. Our Trust & Safety measures include:

  • Verifying National Identity Numbers (NIN) via the NIMC database.
  • Conducting biometric facial matching against official records.
  • Requiring and documenting third-party guarantor details.

The Limitation: While we actively take these steps to promote safety and filter out bad actors, these measures are based on the data available to us at the time of onboarding. Handees cannot and does not absolutely guarantee the identity, background, or future behavior of any artisan, nor do we assume a legal duty of care for their actions. You engage with artisans at your own risk and are encouraged to exercise normal caution and common sense when inviting anyone into your home or workplace.

4. Customer Obligations

To ensure a smooth process for both you and the professional, you agree to:

  • Provide a safe, hazard-free working environment for the artisan.
  • Provide accurate descriptions of the job requirements so the artisan can quote and prepare correctly.
  • Treat all artisans with respect. Handees maintains a zero-tolerance policy for abuse, harassment, or discrimination.

5. Payments and Fees

For jobs sourced through the platform, payments must follow the agreed-upon Handees payment protocol. Handees will not be held responsible for financial losses resulting from "side deals" or private payment arrangements made outside of the platform's official oversight.

6. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by Nigerian law, Handees (and its founders, directors, and affiliates) shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from:

  • Property damage, injury, or loss caused by an artisan during the execution of a job.
  • Delays, incomplete work, or subpar service quality.
  • Disputes arising directly between you and the artisan.

7. Dispute Resolution & Mediation

If you are unsatisfied with an artisan’s work or behavior, you must report it to Handees Support within 24 hours. While we are not legally liable for the artisan's work, Handees will step in to mediate the dispute and, if necessary, suspend or permanently ban the artisan from the platform.

8. Termination of Access

Handees reserves the right to suspend or terminate your access to the platform if you violate these Terms, repeatedly cancel requests without valid reasons, or exhibit abusive behavior toward our network of artisans.
